scripts.install:all: cd Backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend-react && pnpm install
scripts.postinstall: cd Backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend-react && pnpm install
scripts.dev: cd Backend && pnpm dev & cd frontend-react && pnpm dev
scripts.audit:all: echo '--- Backend ---' && cd Backend && pnpm audit && echo '--- Frontend ---' && cd ../frontend-react && pnpm audit
